_meta.description: Complete achievement definitions for Wings Over No Man's Land. Each entry defines an achievement that can be earned by a player. The game code checks these definitions at runtime to determine when to award achievements. Nico: load this file at startup and use the trigger_condition and condition_value fields to drive award logic. The achievement_id is the stable key used in player save data.

achievements.title: First Flight
achievements.description: Complete your first run in any campaign.
achievements.notes: Awards on the first time a run ends (game over or campaign complete). Does not require a minimum score.

achievements.title: Advance Through Belgium
achievements.description: Complete the Belgium campaign as Germany.
achievements.notes: Awarded when Belgium is completed while flying a German aircraft.

achievements.title: Hold the Line
achievements.description: Complete the Belgium campaign as Britain.
achievements.notes: Awarded when Belgium is completed while flying a British aircraft.

achievements.title: Miracle of the Marne
achievements.description: Complete the Marne campaign.
achievements.notes: Faction-agnostic. Awards regardless of which side the player flies.

achievements.title: Salient Survivor
achievements.description: Complete the First Battle of Ypres.

achievements.title: Shores of Gallipoli
achievements.description: Complete the Gallipoli campaign.

achievements.title: Eastern Thunder
achievements.description: Complete the Gorlice-Tarnow campaign.

achievements.title: They Shall Not Pass
achievements.description: Complete the Battle of Verdun.
achievements.notes: Title references the famous French phrase from Verdun.

achievements.title: First Day of the Somme
achievements.description: Complete the Battle of the Somme.

achievements.title: Nivelle's Gambit
achievements.description: Complete the Nivelle Offensive campaign.

achievements.title: Through the Mud
achievements.description: Complete the Third Battle of Ypres.

achievements.title: The Last Push
achievements.description: Complete the German Spring Offensive campaign.
achievements.notes: Final campaign in the arc.

achievements.title: The Great War Ended
achievements.description: Complete all 10 campaigns.
achievements.notes: Master campaign completion achievement.

achievements.title: Tier Two: Albatros
achievements.description: Unlock the Albatros D.V.
achievements.notes: Awarded when Belgium is completed and checkUnlocks() grants albatrosdvstd.

achievements.title: Tier Three: Dreidecker
achievements.description: Unlock the Fokker Dr.I.

achievements.title: Best of the War
achievements.description: Unlock the Fokker D.VII.
achievements.notes: The D.VII was specifically named in the Armistice terms — the only aircraft so honoured.

achievements.title: Pusher Upgrade
achievements.description: Unlock the Airco DH.2.

achievements.title: Three Wings
achievements.description: Unlock the Sopwith Triplane.

achievements.title: The Beloved Pup
achievements.description: Unlock the Sopwith Pup.

achievements.title: Hump of Death
achievements.description: Unlock the Sopwith Camel.
achievements.notes: Named after the characteristic hump fairing over the twin Vickers guns.

achievements.title: Long-Range Striker
achievements.description: Unlock the Airco DH.9.

achievements.title: German Air Service
achievements.description: Unlock all standard German aircraft.
achievements.notes: Requires all 4 standard German aircraft to be unlocked: e3std, albatrosdvstd, dr1std, d7std.

achievements.title: Royal Flying Corps
achievements.description: Unlock all standard British aircraft.
achievements.notes: Requires all 6 standard British aircraft to be unlocked.

achievements.title: Ace of the RFC
achievements.description: Fly in a run using each standard RFC aircraft at least once.
achievements.notes: Historical milestone. Checks hangar_stats to confirm each aircraft has at least 1 flight. Hidden until earned.

achievements.title: Pour le Mérite
achievements.description: Fly in a run using each standard German aircraft at least once.
achievements.notes: Named after Germany's highest military honour, famously awarded to top aces. Hidden until earned.

achievements.title: Der Rote Kampfflieger
achievements.description: Complete a run in the Red Baron livery.
achievements.notes: Der Rote Kampfflieger means 'The Red Battle Flyer' — Richthofen's autobiography title.

achievements.title: Patrol Complete
achievements.description: Reach a score of 50 in a single run.
achievements.notes: Approximately mid-way through stage 2 of Belgium.

achievements.title: Century Ace
achievements.description: Reach a score of 100 in a single run.

achievements.title: Into the Ace Pursuit
achievements.description: Reach a score of 150 in a single run.
achievements.notes: Score 150 is the start of Ace Pursuit (the final stage of Belgium).

achievements.title: Seasoned Veteran
achievements.description: Reach a score of 250 in a single run.

achievements.title: Flying Ace
achievements.description: Reach a score of 500 in a single run.
achievements.notes: Historically, an 'ace' designation required 5 kills. 500 in this game represents sustained dominance.

achievements.title: Legend of the Skies
achievements.description: Reach a score of 1000 in a single run.
achievements.notes: Elite milestone. Hidden until earned.

achievements.title: New Personal Record
achievements.description: Beat your own personal best score.
achievements.notes: Triggers any time end-of-run score exceeds the player's previous best. Repeatable but only awards the achievement once.

achievements.title: Sharp Shooter
achievements.description: Score 25 kills across all runs.
achievements.notes: Lifetime kill count across all aircraft and campaigns. Source: sum of kills in hangar_stats.

achievements.title: Balloon Buster
achievements.description: Score 100 kills across all runs.

achievements.title: Ace of Aces
achievements.description: Score 500 kills across all runs.
achievements.notes: Richthofen scored 80 official kills. 500 here is the game's elite lifetime combat milestone.

achievements.title: Ten Patrols
achievements.description: Complete 10 flights across any aircraft.
achievements.notes: Lifetime flight count. Source: sum of flights in hangar_stats.

achievements.title: Veteran Pilot
achievements.description: Complete 50 flights across any aircraft.

achievements.title: Reached the Pursuit
achievements.description: Reach the Ace Pursuit stage in Belgium.
achievements.notes: Score 145 must be reached in a single run.

achievements.title: Camel Country
achievements.description: Score 200 points in a single run with the Sopwith Camel.
achievements.notes: The Camel was notoriously difficult to fly — a high score with it is a genuine accomplishment.

achievements.title: Baron's Standard
achievements.description: Score 200 points in a single run with the Fokker Dr.I.
achievements.notes: Richthofen flew the Dr.I. Reaching his level requires sustained precision.

achievements.title: Long-Range Mission
achievements.description: Score 150 points in a single run with the Airco DH.9.
achievements.notes: The DH.9 is the hardest British aircraft to fly due to its heavy profile. A lower score threshold reflects this.
